---
title: "Students"
subtitle: "Graduate and undergraduate researchers across BioMIND"
description: "Ph.D., M.S., and undergraduate researchers contributing to BioMIND's work in BioAI, molecular ML, complex systems, and trustworthy AI."
---

::: {.bm-callout .bm-callout-gold}
**Student profiles are being collected.** Each student profile may include program, advisor, lab affiliation, research keywords, short bio, publication links, GitHub, Google Scholar, LinkedIn, ORCID, personal website, and headshot. See the [README](../README.md) for the full content checklist.
:::

BioMIND students work on problems at the frontier of **BioAI**, **molecular machine learning**, **biological foundation models**, **network science**, **trustworthy AI**, and **agentic AI for scientific discovery**, across the cluster's four labs.

## Ph.D. Students

::: {.bm-grid .bm-grid-3}

::: {.bm-person-card}
::: {.bm-person-photo}
S
:::
### Student Name
[Ph.D. · Year]{.bm-person-role}
[Advisor: Faculty Name · Lab]{.bm-person-affil}

*Short bio to be updated.*

::: {.bm-tags}
[BioAI]{.bm-tag} [Molecular ML]{.bm-tag} [Network Science]{.bm-tag}
:::

::: {.bm-person-links}
[Email](mailto:placeholder@ucf.edu)
[Scholar](#)
[GitHub](#)
[LinkedIn](#)
[Website](#)
:::
:::

:::

## M.S. Students

::: {.bm-grid .bm-grid-3}

::: {.bm-person-card}
::: {.bm-person-photo}
S
:::
### Student Name
[M.S. · Year]{.bm-person-role}
[Advisor: Faculty Name · Lab]{.bm-person-affil}

*Short bio to be updated.*

::: {.bm-tags}
[Research Keyword]{.bm-tag} [Research Keyword]{.bm-tag}
:::

::: {.bm-person-links}
[Email](mailto:placeholder@ucf.edu)
[Scholar](#)
[GitHub](#)
[LinkedIn](#)
:::
:::

:::

## Undergraduate Researchers

::: {.bm-grid .bm-grid-3}

::: {.bm-person-card}
::: {.bm-person-photo}
S
:::
### Student Name
[Undergraduate Researcher]{.bm-person-role}
[Advisor: Faculty Name · Lab]{.bm-person-affil}

*Short bio to be updated.*

::: {.bm-tags}
[Research Keyword]{.bm-tag} [Research Keyword]{.bm-tag}
:::

::: {.bm-person-links}
[GitHub](#)
[LinkedIn](#)
:::
:::

:::

## Alumni

See the [Alumni](alumni.qmd) page for former Ph.D., M.S., undergraduate, and postdoctoral researchers and their current positions.

## How to add or update your profile

1. Open `people/students.qmd` in the repository.
2. Copy one of the `bm-person-card` blocks above into the appropriate section.
3. Replace the placeholder fields:
   - **Name** — full name as you'd like it displayed
   - **Program / Year** — e.g., *Ph.D. Candidate · Year 3*
   - **Advisor and Lab** — primary advisor and lab affiliation
   - **Bio** — 1–3 sentences
   - **Research keywords** — 2–5 tags
   - **Links** — email, Scholar, GitHub, LinkedIn, ORCID, personal website
4. (Optional) Drop a square headshot in `assets/people/firstname-lastname.jpeg` and replace the initials placeholder with `![Headshot of Your Name](../assets/people/firstname-lastname.jpeg)` inside the `bm-person-photo` block.
5. Submit a pull request, or send the snippet to the cluster coordinator.

## Publications

Student publications are listed on the central [Publications](../publications/index.qmd) page. You can also link to your own Google Scholar profile directly from your card.
